title: auth.mfa_status
description: Per-user MFA status (workspaces-org-program §C2/C3). Returns {"has_strong_mfa": bool, "factors": [{"id", "strength"}, ...]} — the verification factors the user can actually complete, with the strength canon applied (totp/passkey/otp_phone strong, otp_email weak). Unknown users get {false, []}.

user_id.description: Primary key of the user whose MFA status is resolved.
